sections.title: Starting out by talking to the Concerned man
Talking to the Concerned man after starting the event

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: Fetch me lunch for me then eh, I'm right peckish!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm a bit busy at the moment.

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: Busy mucking about with carrots!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, where did you say that crate was again?

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: It's in the woods just south of here. Carrots all over the place too!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yes, I remember. Thanks.

sections.title: Talking to the Concerned man after entering the hole

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: Fetch me lunch for me then eh, I'm right peckish!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm a bit busy at the moment.

sections.title: Talking to the Concerned man after completing the Quest

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: Mate, it took you so long to get me lunch the Easter Bunny showed up, I had some choccy eggs instead.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great. That was all me you know.

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: What are you talking about? It was definitely the Easter Bunny.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know what?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm still too busy to talk to you.

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: Alright, cheerio!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me, you don't look very happy. What's wrong?

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: There's an egg-shaped hole in my life.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: Usually Varrock is full of Easter merriment by now...

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: Wagons heaving with eggs being hauled up through the streets...

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: Giant rabbits hopping about, building stalls and putting up decorations...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds nice.

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: It was a bloody racket to be honest, and dangerous!

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: But I'd gladly stand on a rusty nail or take a plank to the face for one of them delicious chocolate eggs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough. Now that you mention it, I would have expected the Easter Bunny to have turned up by now. You're sure you haven't seen him?

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: Nobody has, and yet the streets are full of old carrots. We don't usually have such a problem with vegetable waste unless him and his lot have turned up.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Vegetable waste, eh?

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: Aye. It wasn't so bad when it was just the crates lying around, but someone's been in them and scattered carrots all over the place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Curious... I wonder...

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: It's not just Varrock mind, it's the woods to the south of here too!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmmmmmmm.......

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Crates of carrots you say? Woods to the south?

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: Aye, proper suspicious if you ask me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You wait right here sir, I've got a hunch...

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: Oh lunch is it now eh? Can I have some?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, a hunch. About the carrots.

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: They're old and dirty, I don't want to eat those!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No... Just... I'll be back later! I need to investigate some rotten vegetables.

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: They best not end up in my lunch!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait, what was I thinking about? Oh nevermind, it's gone. Can't have been that important I suppose.

lines.speaker: Concerned man
lines.text: *sigh*
